Update lesson copy or engine behavior so the public rules and learn content match.

description: Break follow-up work from docs/cotulenh-rules.md and docs/cotulenh-rules-study-plan.md into implementation beads. Use the rules reference as the source of truth for engine-aligned learn content, section 10/Game-State Rules coverage, complex-mechanic examples, and advanced assessment material so docs, learn content, and verification assets stay aligned.
title: Operationalize CotuLenh rules docs into curriculum and validation assets

description: Implement the rules-doc follow-up to add concrete example material for the hardest mechanics called out in docs/cotulenh-rules.md. Cover heavy bridge crossing, air-defense pathing outcomes, recombine during deploy, and commander exposure versus direct check. The output can be lesson examples, diagrams, test fixtures, or reusable docs assets, but it should make these mechanics teachable and regression-testable.
title: Add worked examples for CotuLenh complex rules interactions

description: Implement the Suggested Next Step from docs/cotulenh-rules-study-plan.md by adding a second question set based on concrete FEN positions. Each item should ask the learner to classify outcomes such as legal move, illegal move, legal capture, illegal capture, legal combine, illegal combine, legal deploy, illegal deploy, check, and commander danger without check, using the rules reference as the answer source.
title: Add FEN-based advanced assessment set to the CotuLenh rules study plan

description: Use the review logic, piece-by-piece checklist, and mechanic review checklist from docs/cotulenh-rules-study-plan.md to create a repeatable QA rubric for lesson authors and reviewers. The output should help future rule-doc or learn-lesson changes confirm that each piece, terrain rule, capture mode, blocking rule, air-defense interaction, deploy behavior, heroic rule, flying-general rule, and game-state concept is still covered coherently.
title: Turn the CotuLenh rules study plan into a reusable lesson QA checklist

description: Story 7.2 review noted remaining use of fixed setTimeout(50) waits in learn-progress-sync.test.ts. Replace with deterministic waitFor/event-driven assertions to reduce CI flakiness and speed up tests.
title: Harden learn-progress sync tests by removing fixed sleep waits

description: Expand the learn curriculum to cover core-enforced rules that are not currently represented as dedicated learn subjects or lessons, especially check versus commander danger, checkmate, stalemate, commander captured, repetition and fifty-move draw rules, and Last Guard promotion.
title: Add learn coverage for game-state and Last Guard rules

description: Create a comprehensive markdown rules reference under docs/, structured around the learn curriculum but aligned to the core engine, including edge cases, deploy behavior, heroic rules, air defense, flying general, and endgame/state rules.
title: Document CotuLenh rules reference

description: Story 5.3 review left one low-priority UI mismatch: ReconnectBanner is rendered below board flow and not fixed at top of game area as specified in Task 5.4. Update positioning/placement in +page.svelte and component styles, and add a UI test or snapshot assertion for banner placement.
title: Align ReconnectBanner positioning with Story 5.3 spec
